description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The front facade includes a three-car garage, a paved driveway, and decorative columns flanking the main entryway. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper level set back and featuring large windows and open interior spaces visible from above. The roof is primarily flat, with some sections slightly raised to accommodate additional rooms or features. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with a mix of standard and larger picture windows. The overall appearance is contemporary and functional, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a three-car garage, featuring clean lines and a contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three-car garage, main entryway with columns, and paved driveway.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement and upper-level setback with visible interior spaces.
description_view_2: Back corner view displaying the flat roof, rear windows, and a side driveway extension.
description_view_3: Side view with the main entry door, additional windows, and decorative columns flanking the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, flanked by decorative columns, a small overhang, and a paved approach.
